data.title: Rocket Mortgage Files Suit Against US Department Of Housing And Urban Development: 'We Will Not Stand Idly By'
data.description: Rocket Companies Inc (NYSE:RKT) has filed suit against the United States Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) related to regulations involving independent licensed appraisers.

data.title: How Trump's Iran Policies Could Shape Oil Markets In 2025
data.description: Oil markets in 2025 may face turbulence as Trump's hardline stance on Iran may result in renewed sanctions, impacting prices and OPEC+ cooperation.

data.title: What's Going On With AMC Entertainment Stock?
data.description: AMC Entertainment shares are up 9.2% Thursday afternoon. Retail investors rally around meme stocks, sparked by renewed activity from Keith Gill, known as "Roaring Kitty."
